calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 219 At 09:00 A.M. On April 29, 2003
Off Calendar May-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Plaintiff, Sebastien Arseguel Dba Heaven present with counsel, Eric Farber.
Plaintiff's was sworn and examined.
The Court hears evidence and grants default judgment in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: Amman Qadir and Pasha, as individuals & Dba Brainchid Entertainment as follows: Actual damages of $2,000.00, Special damages $25,000.00, Costs $668.00, Interest on damages and costs of $400.00, No attorney fees, for a total judgment of $28,068.00. Injunctive relief: Defendants are hereby permanently enjoined from using the trade name "Heaven" in connection with nightclub events in San Francisco. Does 1-10 are dismissed with prejudice.
Judgment signed in open court.
